findings.description: WebView loading URL request via loadRequest:
findings.impact: WebView loading external content - verify HTTPS and content validation
findings.recommendation: Use HTTPS for all loaded URLs and implement WKNavigationDelegate

findings.issue_type: XSS via User Input in loadHTMLString
findings.description: loadHTMLString:baseURL: caller also references user input (UITextField/UITextView) — XSS likely
findings.impact: User input flows to WebView HTML rendering without sanitization — attacker can inject JavaScript via text fields
findings.recommendation: Sanitize all user input before HTML rendering; use textContent instead of innerHTML equivalents
